task_completion.description: Create a local BLAST database from the E. coli genome fasta file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a 'Make database' or 'Format DB' dialog in UGENE, or terminal commands (like makeblastdb) being executed on ecoli_genome.fasta.

task_completion.description: Perform a BLASTN search using the 16S query with an E-value threshold <= 1e-10.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the BLAST search setup dialog in UGENE showing 16s_query.fasta as the query and the E-value parameter explicitly set to 1e-10 (or 1e-100, etc.).

task_completion.description: Identify all genomic copies of the 16S rRNA sequence.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the BLAST results table or output. Based on privileged info, there should be exactly 7 hits listed.

task_completion.description: Save the identified BLAST hits as annotations on the genome sequence.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the UGENE Sequence View or Annotations tree showing the new BLAST results added as annotation tracks/regions on the E. coli genome.

task_completion.description: Export the annotated genome as a GenBank file to the specified results directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing an 'Export' dialog in UGENE saving as GenBank format, or a file manager/terminal showing 'ecoli_16s_annotated.gb' successfully created in ~/UGENE_Data/blast/results/.

task_completion.description: Create a plain text summary report containing the total number of copies and their coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of a text editor or terminal showing the contents of '16s_blast_report.txt' in the results folder, clearly stating the total count (7) and listing the start/end coordinates for the hits.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used genuine bioinformatics software (like UGENE or command-line BLAST) to perform the search and annotation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the UGENE GUI or actual BLAST terminal output. The agent should not just use a text editor to manually fabricate a GenBank file.

integrity.description: Verify the coordinates in the summary report match the actual BLAST results.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the start/end coordinates typed into the text report correspond to the coordinates visible in the BLAST results table or annotation view screenshots.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just guess or hardcode the answer without running the search.
integrity.visual_evidence: There must be a clear chronological progression: running the search -> viewing the 7 hits -> writing the report. The agent should not create the report with '7 copies' before the search completes.

privileged_info_for_vlm: There are exactly 7 copies of the 16S rRNA sequence in the E. coli genome. The genome size is exactly 4,641,652 base pairs. The expected output files must be located at /home/ga/UGENE_Data/blast/results/ecoli_16s_annotated.gb and /home/ga/UGENE_Data/blast/results/16s_blast_report.txt.
